chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْحُبِّ فِي اللَّهِ وَ الْبُغْضِ فِي اللَّهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 60 – The love regarding Allah<sup>azwj</sup> and the hatred regarding Allah<sup>azwj</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (258/ 8)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (258/ 8)

parts.text: أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ النُّعْمَانِ الْأَحْوَلِ صَاحِبِ الطَّاقِ

text: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) وُدُّ الْمُؤْمِنِ لِلْمُؤْمِنِ فِي اللَّهِ مِنْ أَعْظَمِ شُعَبِ الْإِيمَانِ أَلَا وَ مَنْ أَحَبَّ فِي اللَّهِ وَ أَبْغَضَ فِي اللَّهِ وَ أَعْطَى فِي اللَّهِ وَ مَنَعَ فِي اللَّهِ فَهُوَ مِنْ أَصْفِيَاءِ اللَّهِ .

en.hubeali: Ibn Mahboub, from Abu Ja’far Muhammad Bin Al Numan Al Ahowl, Sahib Al Taaq, from Sallam Al Mustaneer,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’farasws having said: ‘Rasool-Allahsaww said: ‘Cordiality of the Believer to the Believer regarding Allahazwj is from the greatest of the branches of Emān. Indeed! And the one who loves regarding Allahazwj and hates regarding Allahazwj, and gives regarding Allahazwj and prevents regarding Allahazwj, so he is from the elites of Allahazwj’.
en.sarwar: 3. Ibn Mahbub has narrated from abu Ja’far ibn Muhammad al-Nu’man al-Ahwal Sahib al-Taq from Salam ibn al-Mustanir from abu Ja’far (a.s.) who has said the following: “The Messenger of Allah has said, ‘Love of a believer for another believer only for the sake of Allah is of the greatest branches of belief. It is certain that whoever loves for the sake of Allah, hates for the sake of Allah, gives for the sake of Allah and denies for the sake of Allah is of the chosen people of Allah.’”
